title: Complex karyotype AML
question: Which statement best describes complex karyotype AML?
options: Defined by ≥3 unrelated chromosomal abnormalities in the absence of another defining recurrent genetic abnormality.
correct_answer: A. Defined by ≥3 unrelated chromosomal abnormalities in the absence of another defining recurrent genetic abnormality.
explanation: Complex karyotype AML is characterised by multiple unrelated cytogenetic abnormalities and is associated with adverse biology.
references: WHO Classification of Haematolymphoid Tumours, 5th edition
